title: 湯けむり☆あんし～ん旅情

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Ever since I became Sasami Anshinzawa's
acupuncture test dummy, I've grown accustomed
to playing along with her whims. On one such
day...

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
Hey, <username>! Look at
what I've got!

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
I won this ticket for a hot spring vacation from a
raffle! This must be some kind of reward for my
usual good deeds! ♪
choice_data_list: What good deeds? Er, I mean, congratulations.

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
Gosh, what's with that lukewarm response? You're
coming along as well, you know?

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
The ticket's for two, and who better to invite
along than my trusty partner?

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
Now enough talking. Off to the hot spring we
go! ♪

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
Wow! ☆ What a luxurious inn! ♪ I'm definitely
gonna brag about this to my master after I get
back!
choice_data_list: Are you sure I should be here with you?

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
Of course! Consider it thanks for always
cooperating with my acupuncture practice! ♪

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
Oh, but don't start thinking that I settled for you
because I had nobody else to invite. I'm not some
loner without friends, you hear me?

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text: Mmm! ♪

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
Ahhh... That felt fantastic! ♪ There's nothing
more relaxing than a soak in a hot spring! ☆

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After a soothing bath, I happen to bump into
Sasami Anshinzawa in the corridor.

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text: Oh! Did you just finish bathing as well?

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
Hot springs sure are amazing! Their restorative
properties are on par with those of
acupuncture! ♪

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
Oh, do you want to go explore the souvenir shop
with me? You should get something for your
trainee there!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Apparently, acupuncture has a big history in the
local area, so we somehow end up buying
matching needle keychains...

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text: Sigh... I'm in heaven! What would I give to just kick back and relax here for eternity! ♪
choice_data_list: That won't do. You know that.

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, I do... I still have an important duty to
fulfill, after all!

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
I'm duty bound to help Umamusume with my
needles and relieve them of their worries!

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
Thanks to your assistance, I'm a much better
acupuncturist than before! And I'm going to keep
on honing my skills! ♪
choice_data_list:
That's the spirit! Let's work on improving your
success rate!

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
Yep! With you as my partner, I know I can make it
big in the acupuncture world!

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
Hey, I know! If we're going to do this, why don't
we expand overseas?

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
We can share the wonders of acupuncture with
people all over the world! My little sister's
well-informed about global affairs, so I'm sure
she'd be happy to lend a hand! ♪

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text: But wait, there's more! When the time comes—
choice_data_list:
...I'm sorry, but I need to be there for my
trainee.

...I'm sorry, but I need to be there for my
trainee.

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
Oh, you! Did you think I was serious?! I was only
pulling your leg! ♪

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
I have no intention of getting in between you and
your racer! None at all!

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
However, my gratitude for you comes from the
heart! ♪ Master even said I can move on from
fetching drin—ahem, that I'm allowed to proceed
to the next step of my training!

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
With me on poking duty and you as my backup,
we're sure to be on the steadiest road to
success! ☆

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
Anyway, nothing beats an acupuncture session
after a nice relaxing soak! ♪

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
I prepared some special needles for today! Come
on, get ready to get a few pokes in you! ☆

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I already had my suspicions, so I'm not surprised
things turned out this way...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But then again, this is just par for the course when
it comes to the two of us.

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text: Hold still... Annnd poke!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Puncture Perfect!

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
Well? Am I amazing or what? I practiced my butt
off for today! ☆

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Thud!

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
Oh my! The treatment was successful, so what's
going on?!

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text: Was it too effective? Hellooo? Can you hear me?

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text: Dang it! I'll get it perfectly right next time!

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
I'm going to look after you so well, you'll regret
ever refusing my offer! ☆

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
So you'd better have <chrname>'s
back and support her as best you can, m'kay?!

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
You sense that you and Sasami Anshinzawa have
formed an irreplaceable bond during this time
together.
choice_data_list: (Wait, is that something you of all people should be saying?!)

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Despite my consciousness slipping further and
further away, my indignance still slips through in
one final mental outburst.
